name: kodeximi
description: Codex-first local delegation runtime protocol for Kimi CLI workers.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate execution-plane work from Codex to Kimi through KodeXimi.
interface.longDescription: KodeXimi plugin-lite gives Codex strict-session instructions, TaskSpec guidance, and review rules for using the local KodeXimi CLI runtime. It is not a hard hook.
defaultPrompt: 初始化当前会话 KodeXimi strict mode。
用 KodeXimi 处理这个执行型任务。
退出当前会话 KodeXimi 模式。
